text: Indonesia: Central government landings in the Padang area of Central Sumatra are expected momentarily. The reported attacking force of 6,500 men is said to be now making a rendezvous at Siberut Island, about 100 miles southwest of Padang. The landings are to be coordinated with paratroop action against the Padang airfield. Government forces, meanwhile, have encountered stiff resistance to their drive into the Tapanuli area of North Sumatra. The attack on 13 April on Makassar by a "two-engine plane of unidentified nationality" is the first effort of the dissident air force formation of which was recently announced
